name: IRC_CX_CONV_TRACKING_DETAILS
description: Stores user conversation request and response tracking information details in the career coach orchestration layers

columns.Name: CONVERSATION_LOG_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier for the converstaion tracking details.

columns.Name: LOG_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Classname where the api is invoked

columns.Name: SOURCE_REQUEST
columns.Comments: Request payload depending on the LOG_SOURCE.

columns.Name: SOURCE_RESPONSE
columns.Comments: Response payload depending on the LOG_SOURCE.

columns.Name: SERVICE_URL
columns.Comments: CE endpoint Url invoked by agent to get requested conversation response.

columns.Name: ADDITIONAL_INFO_01
columns.Comments: Additional column for any other data that may be need tracking in the future

columns.Name: ADDITIONAL_INFO_02
columns.Comments: Additional column for any other data that may be need tracking in the future

columns.Name: ADDITIONAL_INFO_03
columns.Comments: Additional column for any other data that may be need tracking in the future

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
